input.memoryNote: Nobody asked where the cake came from. The strangers in that Airbnb just accepted it. One of them said 'wow thank you.' You said 'of course.' You had never met these people. I have been to six of your birthdays and I have never known what to expect. The backpack has contained: a cake, full cutlery, a framed photo, and once a small speaker. You are the most prepared chaotic person I know.

meta.tiktokHook: My best friend produces birthday cakes from her backpack. I have watched her do this at a stranger's Airbnb. Nobody questioned it. She said 'of course.'
meta.caption: she came prepared to a party she wasn't invited to
meta.whyItWorks: The backpack detail is so specific and absurd it's impossible not to forward. The 'of course' reply is the punchline. Immediate group chat material.
